ops.text: Plan approved 2026-07-07. 3-stage cascade (lexical+neural gate -> local Qwen3-4B LoRA watcher w/ NO_STEER sentinel -> frontier refiner via spawnllm w/ MMR exemplar retrieval). Corpus at plan time: 4,416 events / 3,525 accepted / 4,254 refined pairs / 543 DPO. Phases: 0 hygiene, 1 SessionEnd hook + nightly pipeline, 2 gate/watcher/exemplar data views, 3 lab experiments E1-E7, 4 shadow watcher runtime, 5 weekly retrain.
